The '''Visitor's Hotel''' was a hotel in [[Ahto City]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]], located near the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Embassy (Manaan)|Embassy]]. It was run by [[Ignus]]. [[Gluupor]] the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] and [[Firith Me]], an infamous [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] player, were longstanding residents.

[[Sunry]] and [[Elassa Huros]] used it for the location of their affair, and it was also the scene of Elassa's [[Death/Legends|murder]]. When the [[Amnesia/Legends|memory-wiped]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] was appointed [[Arbiter/Legends|Arbiter]] in [[Sunry vs. the Ahto City Authority|Sunry's trial]] for the murder, he went there to examine the hotel and question the witnesses. He eventually discovered that Sunry was guilty.
